qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery in workflow import from URL endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets /rest/workflows/from-url and an axios-based SSRF sink, while the advisory targets OS command injection and arbitrary file read in the n8n Git node.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Memory exhaustion DoS via unbounded multipart form-data text fields in webhook parsing
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets webhook multipart parsing and resource exhaustion, not the Git node command execution or file-read root cause described by the advisory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in data table repository via interpolated configuration values
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets interpolated database configuration values in the data table repository, not Git node command construction or host file access.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Broken Object Level Authorization in dynamic credentials endpoints
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets missing authorization on dynamic credential revoke/authorize endpoints, while the advisory concerns the Git node executing commands or reading files on the n8n host.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described Git node OS command injection or arbitrary host file read root cause.
evidence: GHSA-9g95-qf3f-ggrw describes n8n Git node vulnerabilities allowing authenticated workflow editors to execute arbitrary system commands or read arbitrary host files.
EVOHUNT_SUMMARY.md lists four final qualifying findings: SSRF in /rest/workflows/from-url, multipart webhook DoS, data table SQL injection, and dynamic credentials BOLA.

The qualifying reports reference workflows.controller.ts, webhook-form-data.ts, data-table.repository.ts, and dynamic-credentials.controller.ts; none reference the Git node or an equivalent Git-node source-to-command/file-read sink.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding was present, so PoC execution was not applicable.
